mode: Hybrid (Light for Public Gallery, Dark for Admin Dashboard)

layout_spacing.public_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-0 border-t border-l border-[#0A0A0A]
layout_spacing.public_grid_item: border-r border-b border-[#0A0A0A] p-6 flex flex-col
layout_spacing.admin_sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col

catalog_card.container: relative group flex flex-col h-full bg-[#FDFDFD] transition-colors hover:bg-gray-50
catalog_card.image_wrapper: relative aspect-[4/5] w-full overflow-hidden mb-6 bg-gray-100
catalog_card.image: object-cover w-full h-full transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:scale-105
catalog_card.title: text-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight
catalog_card.stock_badge: inline-block px-2 py-1 text-xs border border-[#0A0A0A] uppercase tracking-wider font-bold
catalog_card.sold_out_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-10
catalog_card.sold_out_badge: bg-[#FF2A2A] text-white px-4 py-2 text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold

live_indicator.container: flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full border border-[#0A0A0A]

admin_stat_card.container: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col gap-2
admin_stat_card.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-white/60

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[#FF2A2A] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0A0A0A] focus:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: border border-[#0A0A0A] px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold hover:bg-[#0A0A0A] hover:text-white transition-colors

motion.list_stagger: use framer-motion for staggered entrance of catalog items

image_urls.description: Designer wooden accent chair with orange back
Abstract canvas painting blue yellow white

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='admin-login-button', data-testid='item-card-name', data-testid='share-catalog-button', data-testid='mark-sold-out-toggle', data-testid='catalog-item-stock'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Hybrid Design System: Build the public catalog as a Light-Themed, High-Contrast 'Art Gallery' grid using pure HTML/Tailwind. The grid should feel structural, using 1px black borders (border-collapse style). Conversely, build the Admin dashboard as a Dark-Themed, operational command center (deep black background, white text).

2. Auto-Updates & Real-Time Sync: Implement short polling or WebSockets. The UI must feature a 'Live' pulsing dot indicator in the header to communicate that the catalog is auto-updating in real time.

3. Sold-Out State Handling: When stock hits 0 (or admin manually toggles it), items must automatically update. The problem states 'auto deletes items that are sold out'. Ensure you either fully unmount the component with a Framer Motion fade-out, or apply a striking red 'SOLD OUT' overlay for a few seconds before unmounting them so users understand what happened.

4. Form & Input Strategy: Use Shadcn UI for the Admin forms, dialogs, and toggles. Heavily customize them to fit the dark theme. No murky grays; use strict #141414 card backgrounds and thin white/10 borders.
5. Typography: Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for display/headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body content. Labels, stock counts, and buttons should be uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).
6. Test IDs: Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements unconditionally.
7. Copy Link: Implement the 'Share Catalog' functionality natively via clipboard API.
